Database._comment: Set SeedDemoData=true to run the demo seed on a NEW device/server or in PRODUCTION (env: Database__SeedDemoData=true). One-shot: create DB + apply EF migrations + seed demo data; idempotent (skips if a tenant already exists). SECURITY: demo accounts use the known password 'Guzellik123!' — change them immediately in production. SeedReferenceData=true seeds only default subscription plans (no demo data). RecreateOnStartup=true is DEV-ONLY: drops and rebuilds the DB.

Encryption._comment: 32-byte base64 key (AES-256). Use environment variables or secret store in production.
